assumptions: The app is used daily for review management.
Follow-ups are prioritized to maintain customer relationships.
Reviews can be categorized into a limited set of predefined tags.
Action items result in actionable improvements to business processes.
constraints: Deterministic spec pack + pure logic only
Review lifecycle is a state machine.

glossary.definition: A customer's feedback or comment on a job.
A label categorizing the nature of an issue found in a review.
A suggested response to a customer review or issue.
A specific task derived from reviewing a job to improve future service.
The current progress stage of follow-up on a particular review thread.

one_sentence: A local-only inbox that turns pasted customer reviews into categorized issues, suggested replies, and trackable follow-ups.
primary_user: Solo operator managing reputation + follow-ups for small businesses.
problem_statement: The need to efficiently categorize and manage customer reviews to improve business reputation.
success_metrics: Reduction in the average time to categorize each review.
Improvement in customer feedback response rate.
Decrease in repeat complaints based on reviews.
Increase in operator satisfaction with task management.
Enhancement in business reputation through timely and effective follow-ups.
user_journeys: Categorizing reviews into different issue tags.
Generating reply drafts for each review.
Creating action items for process improvements.
Tracking the status of each follow-up thread.
